entries.name: search-prune
entries.purpose: Daily 03:45 UTC — dispatch PruneSearchAnalyticsJob. Five passes: analytics row prune, query-text scrub, sync-job row prune, stale queued/running sweep, soft-deleted hard-delete.

entries.name: search-stalled-sweep
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes — cheap sweep for stalled sync jobs (`running` with no progress > 24h auto-cancel). Keeps user-facing state fresh.

entries.name: search-registry-refresh
entries.purpose: Hourly — rebuild the SearchIndex registry cache from disk. Guards against attribute cache drift during rolling deploys.

entries.name: search-synonym-warm
entries.purpose: Hourly — defensive rewrite of every engine's synonym cache in case cache invalidation missed a mutation. Cheap: batched per (workspace, language). Skips the WarmSynonymCacheJob unique guard by design (this is the belt-and-braces pass).

entries.name: search-drift-check
entries.purpose: Hourly — compare live SearchIndex.config_hash values against the current compiled hashes. Surfaces `needs-reindex` state on admin dashboards when a deploy shipped attribute changes without a follow-up reindex.
